allow: PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'\).access_token; Write-Host "Token OK"; $headers = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $stock = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/stock" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Stock OK - items: $\($stock.items.Count\), totalQuantity: $\($stock.totalQuantity\)"; $movements = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/reports/movements?page=1&limit=20" -Headers $headers; Write-Host "Movements OK - total: $\($movements.meta.total\)")
